hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|Cargo\.lock|tauri\.conf\.json)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Lock/config files are protected per CLAUDE.md"}' || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.rs$' && cd /c/Projects/mdpad-plus-plus/src-tauri && cargo clippy -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -30 || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.svelte$' && cd /c/Projects/mdpad-plus-plus && npx svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json 2>&1 | tail -15 || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.ts$' && cd /c/Projects/mdpad-plus-plus && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'src/lib/' && cd /c/Projects/mdpad-plus-plus && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -25 || true
